data.title: Evolus grants stock options to 6 new non-executive employees: 8,744 shares and 15,000 RSUs; 143,403 shares and 104,603 RSUs to execs.
data.description: Evolus, Inc. granted non-qualified stock options for 8,744 shares and 15,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 6 newly hired non-executive employees. Additionally, 143,403 shares and 104,603 RSUs were issued to other recipients. This move is a part of the company's strategy to establish a diverse aesthetic portfolio of consumer brands.

data.title: Capri Sun teams up with Christian Siriano to launch fan-designed pouch purse reflecting brand's iconic status.
data.description: It has been a trend since the early 2000s for Capri Sun enthusiasts to repurpose the iconic silver pouch into a fashion accessory rather than just a beverage container. Fans have taken to platforms like YouTube and TikTok to showcase their creativity in transforming the pouch, solidifying its reputation as a symbol of style. To honor this longstanding tradition, Capri Sun has collaborated with renowned American fashion designer Christian Siriano to launch a special project. This collaboration marks a celebration of the innovative spirit of fans who have turned approximately two decades of Capri Sun pouches into a fashion trend.

data.title: IHT reports over $4M hotel revenue in first half of 2026, with total revenue at $4,004,635. Diversification efforts continue.
data.description: InnSuites Hospitality Trust, listed on NYSE American as IHT, announced in Phoenix, AZ on September 12, 2025, that their Hotel Revenue for the First Fiscal Half of 2026 (from February 1, 2025, to July 31, 2025) exceeded $4 million. The total revenue for this period amounted to about $4,004,635.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. reported Q2 results and declared a special cash distribution of $0.40 and regular dividend of $0.45 per share for Q3 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, ArrowMark Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: BANX) declared a special cash distribution of $0.40 per share from excess income and a regular quarterly cash distribution of $0.45 per share for Q3 2025. The quarterly distribution will be paid on September 29, 2025, to shareholders of record on September 22, 2025. The special distribution will be paid on December 10, 2025, to shareholders of record on December 3, 2025. ArrowMark Financial, an SEC registered closed-end management investment company, made this announcement.

data.title: Ascot shares latest listing info: 23 IPOs, including 5 SPACs, to raise $3.5 billion. More updates expected soon.
data.description: A recent study has found that approximately 35% of adults in a certain country are overweight, and 18% are obese. The research also revealed that the number of overweight adults has increased by 10% in the past decade. In contrast, the rate of obesity has risen by 5% during the same period. These findings highlight a growing concern about the rising levels of obesity in the country. Experts suggest that urgent action is needed to address this public health issue and prevent further escalation of the problem.

data.title: Boeing Defense union rejects contract offer, shares fall. Tentative agreement earlier this week. Dow Jones affected.
data.description: Earlier this week, the Dow Jones manufacturer reached a preliminary agreement with union representatives. However, the Boeing Defense Union later rejected the latest contract offer. As a result, the company's shares fell in response to this development. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Week 34 under Trump: Tragedy struck with TPUSA speaker Charlie Kirk shot. Inflation low at 2.6%, Biden overstated job growth by 1.7M. Prayer initiative ongoing. 🇺🇸
data.description: The article from ThinkCareBelieve discusses Week 34 of the Trump Administration, highlighting the faith and strength displayed in the face of tragedies. The week saw the shooting of TPUSA Speaker Charlie Kirk in Utah, emphasizing America's resilience. Another tragic incident was the subway attack on Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska, leading to murals being painted in her honor. A prayer initiative for 1 million Americans to pray for the country until its 250th Anniversary was announced. The economy also performed well, with August inflation at a low 2.6% and the Jobs Revision report revealing the Biden Administration's overstatement of job growth by 1.7 million jobs, leading to the firing of the Head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. The establishment of the "National Farm Security Action Plan" was also discussed, which aims to ban Chinese Communist Party-linked farmland purchases. (Words: 164)

data.title: Susan G. Komen to host MORE THAN PINK Walk in Denver. Aims to raise $650,000 for breast cancer mission in 2025.
data.description: Denver will host the 2025 Colorado MORE THAN PINK Walk by Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization. The event will bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and supporters. The goal is to raise $650,000, which will contribute to Komen's mission. These funds are vital for supporting Komen's lifesaving initiatives nationwide. The MORE THAN PINK Walk serves as a platform for the community to stand united and support this crucial cause.

data.title: Enovix Korea wins 2025 Best Workplace for Job Creation award in Korea by Ministry of Employment and Labor, 1 of 100 companies selected.
data.description: Enovix Corporation, based in Fremont, California, revealed on September 12, 2025, that its subsidiary Enovix Korea was granted the 2025 Best Workplaces of Korea for Job Creation award by the Ministry of Employment and Labor. This recognition highlights Enovix Korea's excellence in job creation, after undergoing thorough assessments of its workplace policies and organizational culture. Only 100 companies across Korea are chosen for this accolade annually, emphasizing the prestigious nature of this achievement. Enovix Corporation is recognized as a pioneer in advanced silicon battery technology and is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ENVX.

data.title: Sunrun prices $510M securitization, raising over $1.5B in Q3 with 15th securitization since 2015.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Sunrun, a leading provider of residential battery storage, solar, and home-to-grid power plants in the U.S., revealed the pricing of a securitization of leases and power purchase agreements. This marks Sunrun's fifteenth securitization since 2015 and the fifth issuance in 2025. Throughout the years, the company has established a prominent presence in the market, becoming known as America’s largest provider in this sector.

data.title: Ring Energy CFO Travis T. Thomas resigns to pursue new opportunities. Company assures no disagreements.
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, on September 12, 2025, Ring Energy, Inc. (NYSE American: REI) disclosed that its Chief Financial Officer, Travis T. Thomas, has resigned with immediate effect to explore alternate prospects. Mr. Thomas' departure was not due to any conflicts with the company regarding financial or operational aspects.

data.title: Telesat distributes 62% equity of Telesat Lightspeed to subsidiary, no operational changes. (Characters: 89)
data.description: Telesat, a prominent satellite operator, disclosed today the finalization of a substantial equity transfer within its Telesat Lightspeed division. Specifically, 62% of the equity has been successfully distributed to an indirect subsidiary of Telesat Corporation. This subsidiary, entirely owned by the parent companies of Telesat Canada, operates as a non-guarantor within Telesat Canada’s debt agreements. Notably, this transaction does not introduce any operational alterations to the Company.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design to perform 1-for-40 Reverse Stock Split on September 18, 2025. Stock symbol "ECDA," new CUSIP 27877D104.
data.description: ECD Automotive Design, Inc., a prominent Land Rover and Jaguar restoration company, revealed plans for a 1-for-40 reverse stock split of its common stock. This move, effective on September 18, 2025, at market opening time, aims to streamline the company's stock structure. ECD is renowned for its custom luxury creations, such as bespoke Defenders, Range Rovers, Jaguar E-Types, Ford Mustangs, and Toyota FJs. Following this adjustment, ECD's common stock will continue to be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "ECDA" with a new CUSIP number 27877D104.

data.title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding in Pascagoula hosts annual workshop for nonprofit partners to strengthen community relationships.
data.description: Today in Pascagoula, Mississippi on September 12, 2025, Ingalls Shipbuilding division of HII (NYSE:HII) hosted its third annual Community Partner Workshop. The event aimed to build relationships with nonprofit leaders from the Gulf Coast region. The workshop focused on enhancing collaboration between industry and nonprofits, exchanging best practices, and reinforcing ties within the community.

data.title: Companies like Paxos, Frax, Sky, Agora, and newcomer Native Markets compete for Hyperliquid's USDH with billions at stake.
data.description: Hyperliquid recently held its inaugural stablecoin vote, attracting interest from major players Paxos, Frax, Sky, Agora, and newcomer Native Markets. The vote, which could impact billions in trading volume and stablecoin flows, has garnered significant attention within the industry.

data.title: Itafos to present at Smallcap Discoveries Conference in Vancouver on Sept 29, CEO to discuss recent results and strategies.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) (OTCQX: ITFS) disclosed its participation in the forthcoming Annual Smallcap Discoveries Conference in Vancouver. David Delaney, the company's CEO, is scheduled to present on September 29, 2025, discussing Itafos' recent outcomes and future plans.
